news.title: U.S. CFTC adds New York to string of states its suing to stop prediction market pushback
news.summary: The federal regulator has been suing states that seek to curtail prediction markets activity and claim it should be deemed state-regulated gaming.

news.title: Bitcoin is on track for its best month in a year. $5 billion USDT growth fuels the rebound
news.summary: Strong earnings season trumps geopolitical risks for now, one trader said, as equities and crypto markets "stopped caring" about Iran war headlines.

news.title: Tether's $344 million USDT freeze linked to U.S. 'Economic Fury' against Iran regime
news.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. is seeking to choke off "all financial lifelines" for the regime.
